title: S71 3HJ, Malcolm Christopher Beckett: environmental permit issued – EPR/XP3536UB/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Malcolm  Christopher Beckett Installation name: CK Beckett Oil Processing Permit number: EPR/XP3536UB/V003  "
